description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural design. The exterior is clad in a wood-textured material, complemented by large glass windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The house features a spacious balcony on the upper floor and a main entryway with a small porch and potted plants. The property includes a fenced yard with a tree and a small doghouse, as well as a stone pathway leading to the entrance. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a large grassy area and a few decorative elements. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern two-story house with wood-textured cladding, large glass windows, a flat roof, and a fenced yard with minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the fenced yard with a tree and doghouse, and the wood-textured exterior of the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large grassy area, stone pathway, and the balcony on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entryway, large windows, balcony, and the landscaped yard with a stone path.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the entry porch, potted plants, and the fenced yard with a tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, potted plants, and minimal overhang
